title: gramen lycurum
intro: Gramen lycurum, also known as Horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it effective in treating urinary tract issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Gramen lycurum include improving bone health, reducing the risk of kidney stones, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Gramen lycurum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
